executives.name: Pat Roche
executives.background: Mr. Roche became Chief Executive Officer on February 1, 2023. He previously served as Chief Operating Officer from 2021 to 2023 and as President of the Industrial Systems segment from 2015 to 2021. He joined Moog in 1986.

executives.name: Jennifer Walter
executives.background: Ms. Walter was appointed Chief Financial Officer in 2018. She previously served as Vice President and Corporate Controller from 2013 to 2018. She joined the company in 2000.

executives.name: Mark J. Trabert
executives.background: Mr. Trabert has served as President of the Aircraft Controls segment since 2015. He joined Moog in 1984.

executives.name: Maureen M. Athoe
executives.background: Ms. Athoe has served as President of the Space and Defense Controls segment since 2017. She joined Moog in 1985.

board_of_directors.name: John R. Scannell
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Scannell is the Non-Executive Chairman of the Board. He served as Chief Executive Officer of Moog from 2011 to 2023 and Chairman from 2014 to 2023. He joined Moog in 1990.

board_of_directors.name: Pat Roche
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Roche is the Chief Executive Officer of Moog Inc. and has been a director since 2023.

board_of_directors.name: Kraig H. Kayser
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Kayser is the retired President and CEO of Seneca Foods Corporation. He has served as a director since 2011.

board_of_directors.name: Brenda L. Reichelderfer
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Reichelderfer is a Senior Vice President and Managing Director at TriVista. She has served as a director since 2013.

board_of_directors.name: Peter J. Gundermann
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gundermann is the President and CEO of Astronics Corporation. He has served as a director since 2014.

sources.source_description: Moog Inc. Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended September 30, 2023
